jurisdiction_name: PRECINCT ALLEN TWP NEW WESTON & ROSSBURG
narrative:
Precinct Allen Twp New Weston & Rossburg (precinct in Darke County) has 665 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.5 percentage points.
